release_notes:
🚀 HT Motor Report v1.1 - Major Update

• NEW: Pure Black OLED Dark Mode support for superior visibility.
• PERFORMANCE: Optimized for 90Hz-120Hz displays with buttery-smooth animations.
• AUTOMATION: Integrated real-time Resistance Correction at 75°C (R75) calculations.
• EXPORT: Enhanced layout consistency for Word and PDF reports including graphs and diagrams.
• FEATURE: New 'Direct Share' options to send PDF and Word documents together.
• UI/UX: Added SI Unit selectors and automated date/report number generation.
